name: Sauce Piquante
recipeIngredient: Chopped green onion tops and Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the chicken until it comes off the bone easily. Remove and debone.
2. In a pot, sauté onion, celery, 4 cloves garlic, and bell pepper in chicken fat until translucent.
3. Add the deboned chicken, tomatoes, tomato paste, salt, red pepper flakes, and sugar to the pot. Simmer for 5-10 minutes.
4. Stir in chopped green onion tops, parsley, and mushrooms (if using).
5. Gradually add water, adjusting according to desired thickness. Cook on low heat for 3-4 hours.
6. About 20 minutes before serving, stir in crabmeat and shrimp. Season with salt and red pepper flakes as needed.
7. Serve the sauce over rice.
